summary: Backend testing completed successfully with 100% success rate (13/13 tests passed). All 7 bug fixes from the review request have been verified as working correctly. Tax settings now come from admin (20%), TON circulation is positive, promo activation works properly, business sell endpoints exist with proper security, upgrade costs include resources, and transaction history has correct formatting.

GET /api/business/{id}/upgrade-cost - returns cost with resource requirements ✅

All bug fixes verified as working correctly ✅
